title: [P3] gateway-svc service degradation
rca_summary: gateway-svc experienced ssl handshake failure, causing service degradation.
resolution: Rotated TLS certificates. Restarted load balancers.

title: [P3] payment-svc database deadlock
rca_summary: Two concurrent transactions in payment-svc acquired locks in opposite order, resulting in deadlock.
resolution: Identified and killed blocking query. Added query timeout.

title: [P2] auth-svc service degradation
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced session store full, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased Redis session TTL. Evicted stale sessions.

title: [P2] auth-svc service degradation
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced session store full, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased Redis session TTL. Evicted stale sessions.

title: [P2] notification-svc service degradation
rca_summary: notification-svc experienced template render error, causing service degradation.
resolution: Fixed broken template variable. Hot-deployed fix.

title: [P2] gateway-svc retry storm cascading
rca_summary: Upstream failure caused gateway-svc to retry aggressively. Retry rate reached 0.8+, amplifying the original failure.
resolution: Deployed exponential backoff config. Reduced retry rate from 0.87 to 0.02.

title: [P2] inventory-svc service degradation
rca_summary: inventory-svc experienced warehouse api timeout, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased timeout for warehouse API. Added fallback cache.

title: [P3] gateway-svc service degradation
rca_summary: gateway-svc experienced circuit breaker open, causing service degradation.
resolution: Manual circuit breaker reset after upstream recovery.

title: [P2] auth-svc service degradation
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced session store full, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased Redis session TTL. Evicted stale sessions.

title: [P2] checkout-svc service degradation
rca_summary: checkout-svc experienced inventory lock contention, causing service degradation.
resolution: Batch job rescheduled to off-peak hours.

title: [P3] checkout-svc service degradation
rca_summary: checkout-svc experienced db slow query, causing service degradation.
resolution: Added index on user_id + created_at. Query time dropped from 4s to 40ms.

title: [P2] payment-svc service degradation
rca_summary: payment-svc experienced third party timeout, causing service degradation.
resolution: Circuit breaker triggered. Increased timeout threshold.

title: [P3] inventory-svc service degradation
rca_summary: inventory-svc experienced replication lag, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased replication buffer. Promoted new primary.

title: [P3] auth-svc service degradation
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced ldap timeout, causing service degradation.
resolution: Added LDAP connection pooling. Increased timeout.

title: [P2] inventory-svc service degradation
rca_summary: inventory-svc experienced replication lag, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased replication buffer. Promoted new primary.

title: [P2] payment-svc memory leak causing degradation
rca_summary: Memory consumption in payment-svc grew steadily over 12-24 hours, leading to OOM and pod restart.
resolution: Rolling restart. Added heap monitoring alert. Scheduled fix in next sprint.

title: checkout-svc elevated latency every Friday evening
rca_summary: inventory-svc weekly_batch_reconciliation job runs every Friday at 18:00 UTC. The job performs heavy DB reads on shared tables, causing checkout-svc queries to queue. p99 latency spikes from ~55ms to ~280ms for the duration of the batch. Pattern confirmed across 6 consecutive Fridays in incident history.
resolution: Documented as known behavior. Scheduled batch job rescheduling to 02:00 UTC.

rca_summary: checkout-svc experienced inventory lock contention, causing service degradation.
resolution: Batch job rescheduled to off-peak hours.

title: [P3] notification-svc service degradation
rca_summary: notification-svc experienced dead letter buildup, causing service degradation.
resolution: Replayed dead letter messages. Fixed consumer error.

title: [P3] payment-svc memory leak causing degradation
rca_summary: Memory consumption in payment-svc grew steadily over 12-24 hours, leading to OOM and pod restart.
resolution: Rolling restart. Added heap monitoring alert. Scheduled fix in next sprint.

title: [P3] auth-svc token configuration error
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced token expiry misconfiguration, causing service degradation.
resolution: Fixed JWT expiry config. Tokens now expire in 24h.

title: [P2] auth-svc service degradation
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced jwks endpoint timeout, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased JWKS endpoint timeout. Added local key cache.

title: [P2] payment-svc service degradation
rca_summary: payment-svc experienced third party timeout, causing service degradation.
resolution: Circuit breaker triggered. Increased timeout threshold.

title: [P3] gateway-svc service degradation
rca_summary: gateway-svc experienced rate limit exceeded, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased rate limit quota for internal services.

title: [P2] auth-svc service degradation
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced jwks endpoint timeout, causing service degradation.
resolution: Increased JWKS endpoint timeout. Added local key cache.

title: Payment service latency spike — checkout and gateway cascade
rca_summary: Memory leak in payment-svc connection pool caused gradual exhaustion over 48 hours. At 14:00 UTC Nov 12, connection pool hit capacity, causing checkout-svc upstream timeouts. checkout-svc timeout errors triggered gateway-svc retry storm (retry rate 0.87). Resolved by pod restart at 15:30 UTC and connection pool limit patch.
resolution: Restarted payment-svc pods at 15:30 UTC. Applied connection pool max-size patch. Added memory usage alert at 70% threshold. Scheduled heap dump analysis.

title: [P2] inventory-svc service degradation
rca_summary: inventory-svc experienced index corruption, causing service degradation.
resolution: Rebuilt corrupted index from last checkpoint.

title: [P3] auth-svc token configuration error
rca_summary: auth-svc experienced token expiry misconfiguration, causing service degradation.
resolution: Fixed JWT expiry config. Tokens now expire in 24h.

title: [P3] payment-svc memory leak causing degradation
rca_summary: Memory consumption in payment-svc grew steadily over 12-24 hours, leading to OOM and pod restart.
resolution: Rolling restart. Added heap monitoring alert. Scheduled fix in next sprint.

title: [P2] notification-svc service degradation
rca_summary: notification-svc experienced smtp rate limit, causing service degradation.
resolution: Switched to secondary SMTP relay. Rate limit increased.
